b8eb2807-feb5-409b-9656-4af069ccd18e.comment:
This opening is a step-back. it's cold referencing something in the posting that the hiring manager may have forgotten or never read. it feels very pulled out of nowhere. the previous versions where it starts with "I have done a tour of duty at X so I am familiar with Y & Z" is easier to assume there is a specific reference.

This also has the same issue with over-confidence without the "IMHO, in my opinion, in my experience." you seem to have completely skipped this suggestion for a 2nd time.

The fragment at the end "Fifteen years..." doesn't stand on it's own and it doesn't relate to the previous sentence in a significant way. this is a big step back from what we had going. You made a fix to one thing but the result seems to have regressed most of what was good before.

d7dd72e8-a446-40c8-b85d-14f24d0c1dcc.comment:
This is better, I do'nt really like the phrasing "I've already produced inside coinbase." It would be better as - "Having previously worked within Coinbase..." - this sounds like "I already did that so no big deal"

"Most of my career has been that" - awkward. Better to at least say "has been just that." or "Has been focused on exactly that."

There's also missing punctuation in "At Swift, I ran..." we can't send poorly structured sentences to hiring managers. This paragraph reads like someone with a low IQ wrote it. "I did this. I did that. I also did this."
